ingredients.name: Na2S·9H2O
ingredients.rationale: Removes residual O2 and establishes strict anaerobiosis (methanogens are obligate anaerobes; mcrA is O2-sensitive).

ingredients.name: Resazurin
ingredients.rationale: Oxygen indicator — pink in oxidized state, colorless when reduced.

ingredients.name: NaHCO3
ingredients.rationale: Bicarbonate buffer in equilibrium with CO2 headspace — couples buffering capacity to the carbon source.

ingredients.name: CO2 (from headspace + bicarbonate)
ingredients.rationale: Autotrophic C source; supplied via H2/CO2 headspace + dissolved bicarbonate.

ingredients.name: NaCl
ingredients.rationale: Standard salinity baseline (5 g/L) for non-halophile

ingredients.name: SL-10 trace metal solution
ingredients.rationale: SL-10 (Tschech & Pfennig 1984): Fe, Zn, Mn, B, Co, Cu, Ni, Mo at standard concentrations. 1 mL/L final.

ingredients.name: Wolin's vitamin solution
ingredients.rationale: Wolin's vitamins (Wolin et al. 1963): biotin, folic acid, pyridoxine, thiamine, riboflavin, nicotinic acid, pantothenate, B12, p-aminobenzoic acid, lipoic acid. 1 mL/L final.

ingredients.name: NiCl2·6H2O (Ni supplement, elevated)
ingredients.rationale: Elevated Ni (~10 μM total) for F430 cofactor in mcrA. Standard SL-10 includes lower Ni; this top-up matters.

gas_phase.rationale: H2/CO2 80:20 at 2 atm overpressure — H2 is the electron donor; CO2 is both terminal electron acceptor and carbon source. Pressurized headspace increases dissolved H2.

composition_rationale: Hydrogenotrophic methanogenesis: H2 oxidation coupled to CO2 reduction via mcrA (methyl-coenzyme M reductase). Atmosphere is the dominant energy source; medium provides reducing conditions and cofactors.
uncertainty_flags: ANME directional ambiguity: genome has methanogenesis enzymes (mcrA + WL pathway) but the metabolism may run in reverse (anaerobic methane oxidation). If suspected ANME, replace H2/CO2 with CH4 + electron acceptor (NO3-, SO4-2, or Fe(III)) and verify direction experimentally.
confidence_rationale: base from RecipeContext = 0.57; -0.05 from uncertainty flags → final 0.52
